achievements.title: C'mon and Slam!
achievements.description: Win a game of Tin Pin Slammer with all of your pins intact.

achievements.title: And Welcome to the Jam!
achievements.description: Win a game of Tin Pin Slammer without using any whammies.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Hey, You, Whatchu Gonna Do?
achievements.description: Stun the opponent with a whammy ten times in a single 1v1 game of Tin Pin Slammer.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Watch Me Flex
achievements.description: Earn 30 PP or more in a single game of Tin Pin Slammer.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Let It Rip!
achievements.description: Win a game of Tin Pin Slammer within 50 seconds.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Flyweight
achievements.description: Win a game of Tin Pin Slammer using only pins with weights no greater than 2.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Heavyweight
achievements.description: Win a game of Tin Pin Slammer using only pins with weights no lower than 9.

achievements.title: Flawless Slammer
achievements.description: Win a game of Tin Pin Slammer without getting hit by a whammy.

achievements.title: Pacifist
achievements.description: Win a 1v1 game of Tin Pin Slammer without being credited for knocking out a pin.

achievements.title: Spawn Camper
achievements.description: Knock out a pin within four seconds of it spawning in a 1v1 game of Tin Pin Slammer.

achievements.title: Don't Kill Me Slowly
achievements.description: Defeat the Metal Corehog within 0:30 (Normal or higher, Level 2 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: No 1 2 Trust
achievements.description: Defeat the Vespertilio Canor without activating a Fusion (Normal or higher, Level 3 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Avenged
achievements.description: Defeat the Swing Shark without any recovery pins equipped (Normal or higher, Level 4 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Empty Wardrobes
achievements.description: Defeat the Circle Pit Grizzly without Neku wearing threads and with no more than two pins equipped (Normal+, <= Level 5).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Two Birds with One Car
achievements.description: Defeat the Cornix Canor while having only Psychokinesis or recovery pins equipped (Normal or higher, Level 8 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Enervated Escargot
achievements.description: Defeat Ovis Cantus with at most four pins equipped, one of which being the Red Skull pin (Normal or higher, Level 8 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Yoctometers Apart
achievements.description: Defeat the Dub Rhino with at most four, Positive-type pins equipped (Normal or higher, Level 8 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: If You Want Something Done Right...
achievements.description: Defeat the Wall of Grizzly using only Neku (Normal or higher, Level 20 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Drop the Freaking Moon!
achievements.description: Defeat Leo Cantus with at most five pins equipped, at least two of which having the Apport psych (Normal+, <= Level 20).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: It's My Asskicking Outfit, Bitch!
achievements.description: Defeat Koki Kariya while Neku is wearing threads from four different brands (Normal or higher, Level 27 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Agnus Dei
achievements.description: Defeat the Pteropus Canor with both Holy Light and Sacrifice pins equipped and no recovery pins (Normal+, <= Level 23).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Hyperfocus
achievements.description: Defeat Uzuki Yashiro without your partner wearing threads that normally have the Combo Panel -1 ability (Normal+, <= Level 27).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Inner Peace
achievements.description: Defeat Koki Kariya and Uzuki Yashiro while your partner is not wearing any threads (Normal or higher, Level 27 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Logarithmic Time
achievements.description: Defeat Sho Minamimoto on Week 3, Day 6, or his Blue Noise equivalent, within 2:43 (Normal or higher, Level 30 or below).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Cannibalism Denied
achievements.description: Defeat Tigris Cantus before it heals itself more than seven times (Normal or higher, Level 33 or below).

achievements.title: Trust Your Partner

achievements.title: Carried by Support

achievements.title: At Arm's Length

achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Coagulant

achievements.title: Mammoth Wrangler
